directive_events.owner_directive: Plan: implement T-001..T-009 from docs/specs/adr-051-interactive-blocks.md (contract module -> registry validation -> worker phase marker -> two-phase scheduler -> lineage -> cancellation -> frontend panel host -> migrate DataRouter/PairEditor -> docs). Add 5 new + 2 modified backend test files and frontend panel tests. Then no-context audit + fix P1-P3, then test_engineer system/e2e smoke. One ready-for-review PR closing #1781.
DataRouter drag UI shows generic item_0/item_1 labels; expected behavior is to show the source filename of each item.
directive_events.reason: Owner-directed live-test session on PR #1783: fixing bugs found while testing ADR-051 interactive blocks

directive_events.owner_directive: PairEditor unusable: worker _validate_outputs raises ValueError: Required output port 'port_1' was not produced by the block. Also the item-name (no filename) issue affects PairEditor too.
directive_events.reason: Owner reported second + third bug during live test

directive_events.owner_directive: Fix PairEditor by positionally mapping i-th input port result to i-th output port name in run() (approach A); keep independent output port names. Also derive interactive item labels from source filename via a shared helper in interactive.py.
directive_events.reason: Owner chose approach A for PairEditor output-port fix

directive_events.owner_directive: Remove core process blocks FilterCollection/SliceCollection/SplitCollection (fully replaced by DataRouter). MergeCollection: variadic input ports so users merge multiple Collections at once; move it to the 'routing' subcategory. Also assess feasibility of a DataRouter memory feature that remembers the user's last routing selection.
directive_events.reason: Owner directive: retire collection filter/slice/split (superseded by DataRouter); make MergeCollection variadic + routing; assess DataRouter selection memory

directive_events.owner_directive: MergeCollection must validate that all inputs share the same item_type; if any input's type differs, raise an error.
directive_events.reason: Owner clarified merge type-consistency validation requirement

directive_events.owner_directive: Add a 'remember this decision and skip the dialog on future runs' option to DataRouter and PairEditor. First run: user confirms in the panel and ticks a checkbox; the decision is saved (keyed by source filename) into the node config. Future runs: the block skips the interactive pause/UI and runs directly with the saved decision. If the saved decision no longer matches the current inputs, fall back to opening the dialog. Provide a way on the node to re-edit (clear saved).
directive_events.reason: Owner approved: implement remember-and-skip-UI memory for DataRouter AND PairEditor in this PR; filename-keyed with auto-fallback; no ADR addendum (small feature)

directive_events.owner_directive: Implement remember-and-skip-UI as a unified ADR-051 InteractiveMixin contract: a generic input signature (by item filename), interactive_memory in node config (enabled/decision/signature), engine skips the pause when the saved signature matches the current inputs (default exact-match, overridable per block), generic frontend checkbox + node re-edit. All interactive blocks (core + plugin) inherit it.
directive_events.reason: Owner refined: make remember-and-skip a unified inheritable contract on InteractiveMixin so package blocks inherit it, not per-block code

docs_events.rationale: Frontend-only fix for the codex P1; the ADR-051 governing docs (ADR/spec/ARCHITECTURE/block-dev) already landed earlier on this branch (a5c194c1).
Frontend-only package-panel dynamic-import; ADR-051 spec docs were updated in the backend P1-B commit (04b3dc28).
Frontend type mirror of the backend BlockSummary fields already documented in spec §4.1 (landed in 04b3dc28).

owner_directive: Lead full implementation of ADR-051 (interactive data-processing blocks): InteractiveMixin capability + INTERACTIVE mode registry validation, two-phase worker-subprocess orchestration replacing in-process _run_interactive, block-owned panel manifest reusing ADR-048 asset serving, lineage records the decision, migrate Data Router and Pair Editor, update architecture/block-dev docs and tests. Then dispatch 1 no-context audit agent and fix all P1-P3, then 1 test engineer for system/e2e smoke. Deliver as ONE ready-for-review PR closing #1781.
